title: Add daily API docs generation pipeline
body:
## Summary

Adds an automated daily pipeline to regenerate XML API docs from the latest CI NuGet packages, along with updated documentation.

## Changes

- **`.github/workflows/update-docs.yml`** (new) — GitHub Actions workflow that runs daily at 6 AM UTC (+ manual trigger). Downloads latest NuGets from the public SkiaSharp-CI feed, runs `dotnet cake --target=update-docs` to regenerate XML docs, and creates a PR on `mono/SkiaSharp-API-docs` via `peter-evans/create-pull-request`.

- **`documentation/writing-docs.md`** (rewrite) — Full rewrite replacing outdated `bootstrapper.ps1` references with current `dotnet cake` commands. New sections: Automated Pipeline, Generating Docs Locally, Editing API Docs, Cake Targets Reference.

- **`.github/skills/api-docs/SKILL.md`** (enhanced) — Added Key Concepts section (docs submodule, when to regenerate vs edit), Regenerating Docs section with commands, and link to `writing-docs.md`.
